original: The Paragon XTR-8 Peer is a weapon known as much for its power as its surprising accuracy. The powerful blue laser fires straight and true - every time, and the projected holosight dynamically reconfigures itself on the fly for ideal accuracy no matter the target. No expense was spared, and it shows. This weapon looks equally at home in the hands of special forces troops and haughty nobles alike.\n\nParagon: When it comes to personal defense, we have no peer.
